untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 3 consecutive gap days with specific sequencing logic. While individual gap detection is possible via returns > 1.5%, the backtest engine lacks a dedicated multi-bar gap counter and sequential gap confirmation mechanism. Cannot express '3 consecutive gaps AND no reversal day yet' with available atomic condition operators without multi-bar state tracking.
translation_notes: Approximated gap detection using returns indicator (1.5% threshold). Entry condition approximates gap-up/gap-down sequences but cannot enforce strict 3-consecutive requirement. Price position relative to 20-bar range (price_pos_20) approximates '10% of recent range extremes' constraint. Exit targets use approximate 5% return threshold as profit target. Reversal day detection approximated via open crossing prev_close. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect long/short symmetry in original signal.
